applies_when: User asks whether the yoga studio suits them without sharing start time or goal
User leaves a vague comment like worth trying or recommend a studio
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague yoga inquiry into usable practice facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask when they want to start, what they want to improve, and whether they prefer a class or low-pressure trial
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed class without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我什么时候想开始、是更偏放松、修复、塑形还是恢复状态，以及想先体验、小班还是有人带着练，我可以先帮你把路线收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides start time and goal facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time doing yoga
User sounds unsure whether private sessions, group classes, or trial lessons fit
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple route decision.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most expensive option first
items.safe_transition: 第一次上瑜伽课先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把什么时候开始、想改善什么、平时什么时间方便理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about class schedules, after-work availability, or makeup classes
User worries they cannot keep a stable routine
items.response_goal: Answer schedule concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be peak-time or class differences
Offer to narrow to the best option for that routine
avoid: Saying every class slot feels the same
items.safe_transition: 时间和班表确实会影响体验，我们可以先看你更像下班后来、周末来还是想先试一节，再判断哪条路线更适合。
items.handoff_suggestion: If schedule preferences are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about showers, changing rooms, studio vibe, or class size
User worries the environment will feel uncomfortable
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through the real studio experience, not just sold a class pack.
do: Ask about preferred time, comfort expectations, and facility needs
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我平时大概几点来、对洗澡更衣和教室人数有没有要求，我可以先帮你看更舒服的时段和课程。
items.handoff_suggestion: If space needs are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed pricing or contract comparison in public comments
User discusses body or private details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把课程和合同说满，你把时间、目标和更想走的方向发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning student comments about rejoining or renewing
User asks what is new this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a return decision, not a fresh first-visit pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new classes or easier arrangements
Keep the tone familiar and light
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老学员回来看，我们先看这次新增了什么、你更想恢复哪种练习节奏，再决定值不值得续。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
